The ''Initial Phase'' feature a prize pool of ₹1,20,000 {{Abbr/INR}} ==About== ===Broadcast Talent=== {{box|start|padding=1em}} {{broadcasterCard |position=Hindi Commentator |lang=en |b1=Mayavi|b1flag=in|b1name=Shubham Chawla |b2=CrackJacker Gaming|b2name=Mohit Dawar |b2flag=in |b3=Spero|b3name=Piyush Bathla |b3flag=in |b4=RA1|b4name=Vipul Kumar|b4flag=in }} {{box|end}} ===Format=== ''''' Rooter Pro Scrims: Initial Phase:''' 21st August 2021 to 24th August 2021.'' Maps: {{Abbr/TPP}} [[Erangel]], [[Miramar]], and [[Sanhok]] * ''40 teams divided into two groups A and B.'' * Group A Matches: ''21st to 22nd June.'' * Group B Matches: ''23rd to 24th June.'' * ''Top
